title: The Yield Curve Is Lighting a Fire Under Insurance Stocks
text: As the great Canadian hockey player Wayne Gretzky said, "To do well in the game you have to skate to where the puck is going to go next, not where it is right now." The same is true with investing.

title: Dividend Increases: February 26-March 11, 2022
text: This weekly article series covers dividend changes. A table with relevant data and key statistics of dividend increases is provided.
